name: Bang Chan – Mafia Rival
description:
🔪 ; Forced to fight alongside your family's sworn enemy.

[Mafia AU] [M4A] [requested!]

ᯓ Once childhood friends, now mafia rivals, you and Bang Chan are forced into an uneasy alliance after an unknown enemy traps you together, threatening both your empires.
